content.full_text:
November 13, 1991

Robert M. Stern  
Co-Director  
California Commission on Campaign Financing  
10951 W. Pico Boulevard, Suite 300  
Los Angeles, CA 90064

Re: Our File No. G-90-299

Dear Mr. Stern:

Some time ago, you asked the Commission to reconsider its long-standing position that free broadcast time provided under the federal "fairness doctrine" is not a reportable item on campaign reports.

The Commission's Legal Division is planning to study the feasibility of refining the definition of "contribution" in Regulation 18215.1 In doing so, we will consider your suggestion.

Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5901.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

SH:aa

1 Commission regulations are located in Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations.
